items.title: Two-Pointers & Sliding Window
items.relation: is a pattern in this set
items.description: Sequence-scan patterns — the first ones to try for contiguous sub-array / pair questions.

items.title: Greedy Algorithms
items.relation: is a pattern in this set
items.description: Sort + sweep with a local choice; the first thing to try after pattern recognition suggests it.

items.title: Dynamic Programming
items.relation: is a pattern in this set
items.description: Optimization with overlapping sub-problems; the fallback when greedy fails.

items.title: Sorting Algorithms
items.description: Sort once → enables binary search, two-pointer pair-finding, and sweep-line geometry.

items.title: Graphs
items.relation: is a pattern in this set
items.description: Many problems are graph traversal in disguise (BFS for shortest path, DFS for components, topo sort for dependencies).

items.title: Heaps & Priority Queues
items.relation: is a pattern in this set
items.description: Top-k, k-way merge, Dijkstra, scheduling — anything that asks 'who's the current best?'.

items.title: Time-Space Tradeoffs
items.description: Many patterns spend memory (hash map, prefix sums, DP table) to buy time; recognize when the trade is acceptable.
